meaning: adj.沼泽的,沼泽多的,长在沼泽地带的,住在沼泽地的
examples: On then-meadows and hayfields there is birch coppice chirping joyfully. Flocks of thousand of migrating birds feed upon banks of fenny rivers.
The supermarket is closing its site at Fenny Lock, near Milton Keynes, and transferring the work to a new centre in Daventry, Northamptonshire.
Six months on from opening, Mr Leck is adamant that being a free house is the only way he could have made the Fenny Compton business work given the current climate.
